title: Clean up QUICK-APP/FOLDER-ROOT stale test and template files
description: scripts/QUICK-APP/FOLDER-ROOT contains 15 mixed files: test.ps1, test - Copy.ps1, test(Get-Host).ps1, test - [TEMP].ps1, DellCommandUpdate variants, ActionPacks-master.zip, various Install-Module scripts. Segregate templates into TEMPLATES subfolder, delete stale copies, archive zip.
